positive: A maximalist, vibrant cosmic nebula flowing through a stylized geometric jungle scene. The central focus is a magnificent, ethereal bioluminescent flora element (like glowing orchid structures and crystalline vines) intertwined with abstract, floating geometric mandalas. The overall composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for an apparel print. Use a deep indigo and teal palette contrasted by electric neon magenta and lime green highlights. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry, psychedelic art, and high-detail scientific illustration. Perfect contrast, crisp line work, clean silhouettes, isolated elements against a slightly darker background.
